2604.01170.title: Online Reasoning Calibration: Test-Time Training Enables Generalizable Conformal LLM Reasoning
2604.01170.paper_summary: While test-time scaling has enabled large language models to solve highly difficult tasks, state-of-the-art results come at exorbitant compute costs. These inefficiencies can be attributed to the miscalibration of post-trained language models, and the lack of calibration in popular sampling techniques. Here, we present Online Reasoning Calibration (ORCA), a framework for calibrating the sampling process that draws upon conformal prediction and test-time training. Specifically, we introduce a meta-learning procedure that updates the calibration module for each input. This allows us to provide valid confidence estimates under distributional shift, e.g. in thought patterns that occur across different stages of reasoning, or in prompt distributions between model development and deployment. ORCA not only provides theoretical guarantees on conformal risks, but also empirically shows higher efficiency and generalization across different reasoning tasks. At risk level $δ=0.1$, ORCA improves Qwen2.5-32B efficiency on in-distribution tasks with savings up to 47.5% with supervised labels and 40.7% with self-consistency labels. Under zero-shot out-of-domain settings, it improves MATH-500 savings from 24.8% of the static calibration baseline to 67.0% while maintaining a low empirical error rate, and the same trend holds across model families and downstream benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/wzekai99/ORCA.
2604.01170.paper_summary_zh: 雖然測試時的擴展使大型語言模型能夠解決極具挑戰性的任務，但最先進的結果卻伴隨著高昂的計算成本。這些低效率可以歸因於後訓練語言模型的錯誤校準，以及流行取樣技術中缺乏校準。在此，我們提出了在線推理校準（Online Reasoning Calibration, ORCA），這是一個基於符合預測和測試時訓練的取樣過程校準框架。具體而言，我們引入了一種元學習程序，為每個輸入更新校準模塊。這使我們能夠在分佈變化下提供有效的信心估計，例如在不同推理階段中出現的思維模式，或在模型開發和部署之間的提示分佈。ORCA不僅對符合風險提供理論保證，還在不同推理任務中實證顯示出更高的效率和泛化能力。在風險水平$δ=0.1$下，ORCA在有標籤的任務中提高了Qwen2.5-32B的效率，節省高達47.5%，在自一致性標籤下節省40.7%。在零樣本的域外設置下，它將MATH-500的節省從靜態校準基準的24.8%提高到67.0%，同時保持低的實證錯誤率，且這一趨勢在不同模型系列和下游基準中均保持一致。我們的代碼公開可用於https://github.com/wzekai99/ORCA。
2604.01170.author: Cai Zhou et.al.
2604.01170.authors: Cai Zhou, Zekai Wang, Menghua Wu, Qianyu Julie Zhu, Flora C. Shi, Chenyu Wang, Ashia Wilson, Tommi Jaakkola, Stephen Bates
